query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) AS distinct_ads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT content_fingerprint) AS distinct_fingerprints,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_hash IS NULL AND video_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rows_no_media_hash
FROM ad_performance;

SELECT 
  content_fingerprint,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) AS ad_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT adset_id) AS adset_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT campaign_id) AS campaign_count,
  MIN(ad_name) AS sample_ad_name
FROM ad_performance
GROUP BY content_fingerprint
ORDER BY ad_count DESC
LIMIT 15;
